title: mypy: 4 type-arg errors (missing generic type arguments)
description:
4 type-arg errors for missing generic type arguments:
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/aprs_synth.py:371 - dict without type args
- src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py:97 - Task without type args
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/bridge.py:86 - Task without type args
- src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:179 - list without type args

Fix: Add explicit type arguments, e.g., dict[str, Any], Task[None], list[bytes].
